issue: forgot password outlook login
resolution: Password reset via self-service portal. MFA re-enrolled. Resolved in 10 minutes.

issue: laptop spilled water not turning on
resolution: Device powered off. Brought to IT desk. Liquid damage on motherboard. Replacement laptop issued in 4 hours.

issue: entire office internet down outage
resolution: NOC identified faulty core switch. Replacement completed. Connectivity restored in 45 minutes.

issue: teams crashes joining meeting call
resolution: Cleared Teams cache, updated client. Root cause: corrupted cache from failed update.

issue: vpn not connecting working from home
resolution: Reinstalled VPN client, updated certificate. Root cause: expired auth certificate.

issue: ransomware message screen clicked link
resolution: Machine isolated immediately. SOC investigated. Contained to single device. OS reimaged in 2 hours.

issue: monitor flickering black screen
resolution: Replaced DisplayPort cable. Resolved immediately. Root cause: faulty cable.

issue: excel crash freeze not responding
resolution: Disabled conflicting add-ins, repaired Office. Root cause: third-party add-in conflict.

issue: account locked cannot login access
resolution: Account unlocked in AD. Root cause: 5 failed login attempts triggered lockout.

issue: printer not printing offline
resolution: Cleared print queue, restarted print spooler. Root cause: stuck job blocking queue.

issue: erp system down all staff
resolution: Escalated to Tier-2. Database service restarted. Full recovery in 90 minutes.

issue: file share drive inaccessible department
resolution: Permissions group membership corrected by IAM. Access restored in 2 hours.

issue: ceo email not working access
resolution: Exchange mailbox issue resolved by Tier-2. Root cause: mailbox quota exceeded.

issue: my laptop won't turn on after i spilled water on it.
resolution:
1. Power off the device immediately.
2. Disconnect all cables and power.
3. Bring the device to the IT desk for inspection.
4. If the issue persists, please reply to this ticket.

issue: i forgot my password and can't log into outlook.
resolution:
1. Use the self-service password reset link on the company intranet.
2. Clear your browser cache and try again.
3. Ensure your authenticator app time is synced.
4. If still locked out, please reply to this ticket.

issue: the entire office internet is down. no one can work.
resolution: This issue has been identified as a critical or security incident. It is being escalated immediately to the senior support team. A specialist will contact you within the SLA window. Please do not attempt further troubleshooting.
